title: Fresh Monsoon Strawberries Salad
description: A fresh and crisp monsoon dutch dish featuring strawberries that are roasted to enhance their natural sweetness.
instructions: Wash the strawberries thoroughly and slice them into halves.
In a bowl, mix sliced strawberries with rice vinegar and olive oil. Toss until the strawberries are evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture onto an oven-safe plate or baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Roast in preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes or until the strawberries start to caramelize slightly, stirring halfway through cooking time.
Remove from heat and let it cool down a bit before serving.
